name: Creamed Herring
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Pickled Herring in Sour Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the herring (sauce and all) in a food processor or blender until smooth.
2. Add the apple pieces, sour cream, and white onion to the processed herring mixture.
3. Continue processing until everything is well combined and smooth.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Makes about 2 cups of dip. Suggested dippers: Cocktail Rye Bread, Lavash Crackers, Broccoli, Cherry Tomatoes, Zucchini
